title: Visual Context Compression
description: Dissertation direction: compressing visual context for VLA inference efficiency.
notes: Edoardo Ponti's area. Could combine with LoRA/PEFT experience.

title: AffordanceVLA: VLA Model with Affordance-Aware Understanding
description: New VLA model that bridges VLM semantic spaces and embodied control policies using affordance-aware understanding for robotic manipulation.
notes: Directly relevant to dissertation direction. Addresses the structural mismatch between VLM semantic spaces and control policies - core problem for VLA inference.

title: KITScenes: European Autonomous Driving Multimodal Dataset
description: High-fidelity European AD dataset with synchronized LiDAR, cameras, and HD maps. Fills gaps in geographic diversity and sensor fidelity.
notes: Wayve-relevant. European dataset with better sensor fidelity than nuScenes. Worth exploring for understanding current AD benchmarks.

title: AdaCodec: Predictive Visual Code for Video MLLMs
description: Compresses visual tokens in video MLLMs by exploiting temporal redundancy. Reduces repeated encoding of shared objects/backgrounds across frames.
notes: Visual context compression for video models. Adjacent to dissertation interest in compressing visual context for VLA inference.
